channel.title: Stars on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stars on Arrans github.io

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and product roadmaps in the simplest way possible.

item.title: open-guides/og-aws
item.description: 📙 Amazon Web Services — a practical guide

item.title: zed-industries/zed
item.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.

item.title: syncthing/syncthing
item.description: Open Source Continuous File Synchronization

item.title: casey/just
item.description: 🤖 Just a command runner

item.title: starship/starship
item.description: ☄🌌️ The minimal, blazing-fast, and infinitely customizable prompt for any shell!

item.title: WerWolv/ImHex
item.description: 🔍 A Hex Editor for Reverse Engineers, Programmers and people who value their retinas when working at 3 AM.

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: ruffle-rs/ruffle
item.description: A Flash Player emulator written in Rust

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models.

item.title: waydroid/waydroid
item.description: Waydroid uses a container-based approach to boot a full Android system on a regular GNU/Linux system like Ubuntu.

item.title: yt-dlp/yt-dlp
item.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

item.title: donnemartin/system-design-primer
item.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.

item.title: obsproject/obs-studio
item.description: OBS Studio - Free and open source software for live streaming and screen recording

item.description: 18 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI 🔗 https://microsoft.github.io/generative-ai-for-beginners/

item.description: Ebitengine - A dead simple 2D game engine for Go

item.description: Mirror of vikunja from https://code.vikunja.io/api

item.title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: Implementing a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.title: outline/outline
item.description: The fastest knowledge base for growing teams. Beautiful, realtime collaborative, feature packed, and markdown compatible.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome
item.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics

item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.description: LLM training in simple, raw C/CUDA

item.description: The distributed financial transactions database designed for mission critical safety and performance.

item.description: A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software

item.description: 🌸 A command-line fuzzy finder

item.description: An IPFS implementation in Go

item.title: papers-we-love/papers-we-love
item.description: Papers from the computer science community to read and discuss.

item.description: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

item.description: music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger

item.title: fish-shell/fish-shell
item.description: The user-friendly command line shell.

item.title: rclone/rclone
item.description: “rsync for cloud storage” - Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, Backblaze B2, One Drive, Swift, Hubic, Wasabi, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, Azure Files, Yandex Files

item.title: sickcodes/Docker-OSX
item.description: Run macOS VM in a Docker! Run near native OSX-KVM in Docker! X11 Forwarding! CI/CD for OS X Security Research! Docker mac Containers.

item.description: 🔮 ChatGPT Desktop Application (Mac, Windows and Linux)

item.description: A simple guide to HTML elements

item.title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
item.description: An incremental parsing system for programming tools

item.title: ziglang/zig
item.description: General-purpose programming language and toolchain for maintaining robust, optimal, and reusable software.

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: miniflux/v2
item.description: Minimalist and opinionated feed reader

item.title: ocornut/imgui
item.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source & self-hostable Heroku / Netlify / Vercel alternative.

item.title: microsoft/FluidFramework
item.description: Library for building distributed, real-time collaborative web applications

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Get answers to your questions, whether they be online or in your own notes. Use online AI models (e.g gpt4) or private, local LLMs (e.g llama3). Self-host locally or use our cloud instance. Access from Obsidian, Emacs, Desktop app, Web or Whatsapp.

item.title: lobehub/lobe-chat
item.description: 🤯 Lobe Chat - an open-source, modern-design LLMs/AI chat framework. Supports Multi AI Providers( OpenAI / Claude 3 / Gemini / Ollama / Bedrock / Azure / Mistral / Perplexity ), Multi-Modals (Vision/TTS) and plugin system. One-click FREE deployment of your private ChatGPT chat application.

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: GPT based autonomous agent that does online comprehensive research on any given topic

item.title: tmrts/go-patterns
item.description: Curated list of Go design patterns, recipes and idioms

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: A Windows and Office activator using HWID / Ohook / KMS38 / Online KMS activation methods, with a focus on open-source code and fewer antivirus detections.

item.title: rust-lang/rust
item.description: Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

item.title: BuilderIO/micro-agent
item.description: An AI agent that writes (actually useful) code for you

item.title: iptv-org/iptv
item.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and speaker recognition using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, C/C++, Python, Kotlin, C#, Go, NodeJS, Java, Swift, Dart, JavaScript, Flutter

item.title: dart-lang/sdk
item.description: The Dart SDK, including the VM, dart2js, core libraries, and more.

item.title: spotDL/spotify-downloader
item.description: Download your Spotify playlists and songs along with album art and metadata (from YouTube if a match is found).
